description_long: This is a single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined fuselage and a distinctive black and teal paint scheme. The wings are straight with rounded tips and feature teal flame-like patterns along their leading edges. The fuselage displays the text 'BAD PILOT' in bold teal letters on both sides, adding a personalized touch. The propeller is four-bladed and painted in a light teal color, matching the accent details on the wings and tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is not fully visible, but a tailwheel is present, suggesting a taildragger configuration.
description: A black and teal single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with 'BAD PILOT' text, flame patterns, and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four-bladed teal propeller, wide straight wings with teal flame accents, and the streamlined nose.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the 'BAD PILOT' text, cockpit canopy, and the flame patterns on the wing and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tailwheel, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan with teal accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the fuselage, cockpit, and the continuation of the flame patterns.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight, rounded wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; flame-patterned leading edges.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a four-bladed propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with a visible tailwheel; main gear not fully visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
